title: Lonavala Bypass
overview: Siddarth, Bhau, Kadam and Cable are four friends running their shops on the same road. During a morning walk the four friends notice a car which has met with accident and has a bag containing lot of money they decide to keep the money for themselves and divide equally. But as circumstances change will they be faithful to each other as situation gets difficult?
